task.title: Fix /api/send target resolution and agent cli/model display

events.content: Normalized direct-message recipients and added spawned-not-connected guard: Normalized direct-message recipients and added spawned-not-connected guard

raw.question: Normalized direct-message recipients and added spawned-not-connected guard
raw.chosen: Normalized direct-message recipients and added spawned-not-connected guard
raw.reasoning: Dashboard can show broker-spawned agents before Relaycast registration; sending to those names produced opaque 'Agent not found'. We now resolve case-insensitive canonical names and return a specific 409 when spawned agent is not yet relay-connected.

events.content: Parsed CLI command strings into provider + model in server snapshot paths: Parsed CLI command strings into provider + model in server snapshot paths

raw.question: Parsed CLI command strings into provider + model in server snapshot paths
raw.chosen: Parsed CLI command strings into provider + model in server snapshot paths
raw.reasoning: Spawned agents and Relaycast metadata may encode '--model' inline in cli strings; splitting this restores consistent AgentCard/sidebar display and avoids showing full command as cli.

retrospective.summary: Fixed local dashboard messaging/display regressions: canonicalized /api/send target resolution, added explicit spawned-not-connected errors, normalized spawned/relaycast cli+model parsing, stopped forcing synthetic spawned-only agents online, and propagated model/cwd through /api/bridge to frontend mapping.
